blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
